tasks.name: E1: Construct PCA-Basis SAE
tasks.description: Compute top-k principal components of Pythia-160M layer 8 activations (2k tokens) and construct a PCA-basis SAE by replacing the decoder with these PCs. Match L0 to Standard SAE. Save checkpoint.

pilot.pass_criteria: PCA SAE loads successfully; decoder columns are orthonormal; L0 within 20% of Standard SAE

tasks.name: E1: Absorption Evaluation on All Conditions
tasks.description: Run SAEBench absorption evaluator and custom semantic-hierarchy pipeline on: (a) 3 trained SAEs (Standard, TopK, Matryoshka), (b) existing Random SAE, (c) new PCA-basis SAE. Compute first-letter, semantic-hierarchy, and non-hierarchy absorption.

pilot.pass_criteria: All conditions return finite absorption scores; PCA score within 0.1 of trained SAEs on semantic hierarchies

visualizations.description: Mean absorption by condition (trained, random, PCA) per task type

tasks.name: E1: Statistical Analysis (ANOVA)
tasks.description: Compute one-way ANOVA across conditions (trained, random, PCA) for each task type. Report F-statistic, p-value, and effect size (eta-squared).

tasks.name: E2: Collect Downstream Utility Metrics
tasks.description: For all 8 SAEs, collect or compute: sparse probing F1, RAVEL Cause/Isolation (if available), PW-MCC feature consistency, and steering efficacy proxy. Also collect L0 and reconstruction loss. Use SAEBench public data where available; compute via SAELens otherwise.

pilot.pass_criteria: Metrics collected for >= 6 SAEs; sparse probing F1 in [0, 1]; L0 values consistent with configs

tasks.name: E2: Partial Correlation Analysis
tasks.description: Compute partial Pearson correlation between first-letter absorption and each downstream metric, controlling for L0 and reconstruction loss. Bootstrap 95% CI (B=10,000). Test against null of r=0.

visualizations.description: Absorption vs downstream utility with regression line

tasks.name: E3: Low Co-occurrence Non-Hierarchy Control
tasks.description: Create 5 random unrelated word pairs with low semantic co-occurrence (e.g., zebra-quantum, volcano-piano). Run custom absorption pipeline on all 8 SAEs. Compare with existing hierarchy and high co-occurrence results.

pilot.pass_criteria: All pairs return finite absorption scores; probe AUROC < 0.8 for at least 3/5 pairs (verifying low co-occurrence)

visualizations.description: Absorption by condition: hierarchy vs high co-occurrence vs low co-occurrence

tasks.name: E3: Paired t-tests Across Conditions
tasks.description: Run paired t-tests: hierarchy vs high co-occurrence (replication), hierarchy vs low co-occurrence (new). Report t-statistic, p-value, and Cohen's d.

tasks.name: E4: Random-Baseline Margin Computation
tasks.description: For all 8 SAEs, compute margin = (trained_score - random_score) / trained_score for semantic-hierarchy absorption. Use existing iter_002 data for trained and random scores.

tasks.name: E4: Welch's t-test on Architecture Groups
tasks.description: Compare random-baseline margins between low-absorption (Matryoshka, Gated, PAnneal) and high-absorption (BatchTopK, TopK, JumpRelu) architecture groups using Welch's t-test.

visualizations.description: Welch's t-test results for architecture group comparison

tasks.name: H5/H7: Ranking Consistency and Correlation
tasks.description: Compute Pearson correlation between first-letter and semantic-hierarchy absorption (H5). Compute Kendall's tau between raw ranking and random-baseline-corrected ranking (H7). Bootstrap 95% CI.

tasks.name: H6: Model-Specific Metric Behavior (GPT-2 vs Pythia)
tasks.description: Compare semantic-hierarchy absorption for the same architecture (Standard) on GPT-2 small vs Pythia-160M. Use existing iter_002 GPT-2 replication data and Pythia data. Run paired t-test across hierarchies. Report divergence statistics.

visualizations.description: Standard SAE absorption: GPT-2 vs Pythia per hierarchy

tasks.name: H8: Probe Difficulty Ceiling Effect
tasks.description: Report distribution of probe AUROCs across all hierarchies, SAEs, and conditions. Compute mean, std, min, max. Test whether mean > 0.95.

visualizations.description: Probe AUROC distribution across all conditions

tasks.name: Generate All Paper Figures
tasks.description: Generate all figures and tables for the paper using matplotlib/seaborn. Save as high-resolution PNG and PDF.
